name: BottomlessWater
title: Bottomless Water
author: Gabriel Dungan (DunganSoft Technologies)
description: Keeps owned liquid containers full with secure SteamID admin controls, modern Rust liquid handling, and optimized tick performance. Requires Oxide 2.0.7022+. Verified through Oxide 2.0.7423.

permissions.name: bottomlesswater.use
permissions.description: Receive infinite water for owned liquid containers and use the /bw command.

permissions.name: bottomlesswater.admin
permissions.description: Use the bottomlesswater.* console / RCON admin commands.

commands.description: Toggle or check your own infinite-water setting.
Admin: set another player's infinite-water state (console/RCON).
Admin: report infinite-water state for one or all players.
Admin: reload configuration and restart the tick timer.
